meta.notes: Template spans A1:N51 but active form content is within A1:G51. Column D is the widest column (48.71 units) holding item descriptions. Always write to the top-left cell of a merged region.

sections.label: Institutional Header
sections.notes: Static university branding, logo area, and form code. Never write to these rows.

sections.label: Form Information
sections.notes: Contains Department, PR Number, Section, and Date. Row 10 is a full-width divider line (A10:G10 merged). Do not write to row 10.

sections.label: Item List
sections.notes: Row 11 is the table header (read-only). Data rows are 12-45 (34 slots). Each row: A=Quantity, B=Unit, C:D merged=Item Description, E:F merged=Unit Cost, G=Total Cost (formula). Write item descriptions to column C (top-left of C:D merge). Write unit costs to column E (top-left of E:F merge).

sections.label: Total
sections.notes: A46:E46 merged with TOTAL label. G46 holds the SUM formula for all Total Cost values. Do not write to any cell in this row.

sections.label: Footer — Purpose, Signature, Requestor
sections.notes: Row 47 is a blank divider (A47:G47 merged). Rows 48-51 contain the purpose, signature, and requestor fields. E50 and E51 contain static text (Campus Director info) — do not overwrite them.

form_fields.label: Department
form_fields.pdf_location: Top-left meta block, first row left column

form_fields.label: PR Number
form_fields.pdf_location: Top-left meta block, first row right column

form_fields.label: Section
form_fields.pdf_location: Top-left meta block, second row left column

form_fields.label: Date
form_fields.pdf_location: Top-left meta block, second row right column

form_fields.label: Line Items
form_fields.notes: Each element in the items array maps to one Excel row starting at row 12. Fields within each row are listed below.

row_fields.label: Item Description
row_fields.notes: Write to column C. The C:D merge will display the full text across the wide column D (width 48.71). This is the main description field.
row_fields.example: Potassium Hydrogen Phthalate, AR Grade, 500g, branded

row_fields.label: Unit Cost
row_fields.notes: Write to column E. The E:F merge displays the unit cost. Do NOT write a currency symbol — format is handled by Excel cell formatting.

row_fields.label: Total Cost
row_fields.notes: Computed automatically as Quantity × Unit Cost. Do not write to this column — it must remain a formula. If the template has no formula pre-loaded, inject the formula =A{row}*E{row} for each populated row.

form_fields.label: Grand Total
form_fields.notes: This is the SUM of all total_cost values. Do not write to this cell. If the template has no formula pre-loaded, inject =SUM(G12:G45).

form_fields.label: Purpose
form_fields.example: For CHEM1ET and CHEMENG Laboratory experiments

form_fields.label: Name of Requestor (Section Head)
form_fields.pdf_location: Footer, NAME OF REQUESTOR row, left column

form_fields.label: Name of Department Head
form_fields.notes: IMPORTANT — The PDF example shows a Department Head column (HEHERSON P. RAMOS) between the Section Head and Campus Director. However, the current template has NO separate cell mapped for this. The C50:D50 merged cell is shared with requestor_name. You have two options: (1) Place both names in C50 separated by spacing or a tab, or (2) Modify the template to add a dedicated Department Head column by splitting C50:D50 into two separate cells.
form_fields.pdf_location: Footer, NAME OF REQUESTOR row, middle column

readonly_cells.reason: Institutional header — static branding, address, and form code
Full-width horizontal divider line between meta fields and item table
Table column headers: Quantity, Unit, Item Description, Unit Cost, Total Cost
TOTAL row — A46:E46 is the label, G46 is the SUM formula
Blank divider row between TOTAL and footer sections
Campus Director name (Engr. REXMELLE F. DECAPIA, JR. Ph.D.) — static, do not overwrite
Campus Director title — static, do not overwrite

merged_cell_groups.note: INPUT — Department name. Write to B8.
INPUT — PR Number. Write to F8.
INPUT — Section name. Write to B9.
INPUT — Item description per row. Write to column C of each row.
INPUT — Unit cost per row. Write to column E of each row.
Grand total formula — readonly, do not overwrite
INPUT — Purpose text. Write to C48.
Signature line area — left blank for physical signature
INPUT — Requestor name (Section Head). Write to C50.
Campus Director name — static, DO NOT OVERWRITE
INPUT — Requestor designation. Write to C51.
Campus Director title — static, DO NOT OVERWRITE

formula_injection.notes: If the template rows 12-45 do not have pre-loaded formulas in column G, inject =A{row}*E{row} for each populated row only. Always inject =SUM(G12:G45) in G46 if missing.

acceptance_criteria: department, section_name, and date must always be filled
At least one line item (rows 12-45) must be populated
Every populated item row must have quantity, unit, item_description, and unit_cost
total_cost column G must be a formula — never a hardcoded number
G46 must always show the correct grand total via SUM formula
Do NOT overwrite E50:G50 (Campus Director name) or E51:G51 (Campus Director title)
Do NOT alter any cell formatting, borders, or merged regions
Export the sheet as PDF preserving full layout including borders and merged cells
PDF print area must be A1:G51

known_template_gap.description: The PDF example shows a separate Department Head column (Name and Designation) between Section Head and Campus Director. The current template does NOT have a dedicated cell for this. The C50:D50 merged range is the only non-static input in the NAME OF REQUESTOR row.
known_template_gap.recommended_fix: Split C50:D50 into two separate cells: C50 for Section Head name and D50 for Department Head name. Do the same for C51:D51 (Designation row). Update this JSON after template modification.

sample_data_payload.purpose: For CHEM1ET and CHEMENG Laboratory experiments

items.item_description: Potassium Hydrogen Phthalate, AR Grade, 500g, branded
